case_title: STEVEN, NEIL vs. CARY SILBERMAN,IND DBA LAW OFFICES CARY SILBERMAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STEVEN, NEIL AS TO DEFENDANT CARY SILBERMAN,IND DBA LAW OFFICES CARY SILBERMAN
